title: The Tavern Cat
entries: You see a {table:gm/npc/cat-size} cat with {table:gm/npc/cat-color} coloration, {table:gm/npc/cat-eyes} and {table:gm/npc/cat-markings}. It was bred to {table:gm/npc/cat-purpose}, enjoys {table:gm/npc/cat-food}, typically has {table:gm/npc/cat-habits}, and is especially talented at {table:gm/npc/cat-talent}. Rumor has it this cat {table:gm/npc/cat-quirks}.
